settings.banner_subtitle: Clean, nourishing spreads crafted with thoughtfully sourced, real ingredients that you can trust. Loved by families who want better, healthier choices without compromising on taste.
settings.story_body:
Born in a Dubai kitchen from a lifelong craving to snack better — cleanfuelcrew is wholesome food made honest, minimal, and truly delicious.

What began as a personal mission in Dubai to navigate the demands of insulin resistance without giving up a sweet tooth evolved into cleanfuelcrew, a brand focused on providing honest energy. Disappointed by the lack of clean options and tired of "healthy snacks" packed with hidden sugars and chemical additives, our founder started crafting artisanal treats in their own kitchen.
settings.mission_quote: To inspire mindful eating and support families in building a lifestyle rooted in health, taste, and togetherness.
settings.person_body:
A founder first, Ayesha's belief in clean, nourishing ingredients shapes every product she creates. Living in Dubai for over a decade and managing insulin resistance herself, she understands the challenge of finding treats that satisfy cravings without compromise.

cleanfuelcrew is her way of sharing that solution with everyone who wants better snacks — full of flavour, naturally sweetened, and made with ingredients they can genuinely trust.
